We reorganized the repo. Here's where you work and what changed.

**Read first:** `docs/PROJECT-BRIEF.md` (session open/close) · `docs/gtm/HANDOFF.md` (full detail)

**Your folders:**
- `content/sales/` — emails, one-pager PDF, strategy
- `content/case-studies/cases.json` — case study stories (after edits: `npm run build` or Netlify rebuild)
- `docs/gtm/90-DAY-PLAN.md` — 90-day plan (starts **Monday, June 29, 2026**)

**Do NOT edit:** `src/` (website thread) · `site/` is deprecated

**GitHub vs live site:**
- Whole repo backs up to GitHub (use **private** repo)
- **Live site = `dist/`** from Astro (`npm run build`) on Netlify — currently generic URL; **logoclothingshop.com** custom domain next
- Sales emails and one-pager in `content/sales/` never deploy to the website
- See `docs/DEPLOYMENT.md`

**Brand & contact:**
- Live as **Logo Clothing Shop** · soon **Stitch & Stone Co.** (bridge only)
- **hello@logoclothingshop.com** everywhere (website, email, marketing)
- Website + GTM run **in parallel** (not paused)

**Case studies corrected in sales assets:** Karmanos (survivor gloves, not Tommy Hearns), Ven Johnson (Nats at the Zoo, 800+ pieces), Orfin (80 blankets/10 days, Laura D.), Weldaloy added (300 chargers, Norm F.)

**Sales voice:** Sandler, human tone, no em dashes, send FROM hello@logoclothingshop.com
